message:
fix(node): guard obligation update_status against terminal state transitions

ObligationLedger::update_status() allowed transitioning obligations OUT
of terminal states (Fulfilled, Rejected, TimedOut, Cancelled) back to
non-terminal states like Created. This violates the obligation lifecycle
invariant — once an obligation reaches a terminal state, it should be
immutable.

Added is_terminal() guard that returns ERR_OCH_INVALID_TRANSITION when
the current state is terminal, matching the pattern used by fulfill().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
